nasb.text: The guardrooms of the gate toward the east numbered three on each side; the three of them had the same measurement. The side pillars also had the same measurement on each side.

esv.text: And there were three side rooms on either side of the east gate. The three were of the same size, and the jambs on either side were of the same size.

cnv.text: 東門的守衛室，這邊有三間，那邊有三間；三間都是一樣的長寬；兩邊的牆柱都是一樣的厚。

ccb.text: 东门内共有六间守卫室，每边三间，大小面积都是一样，两边的墙尺寸也相同。
